source_name: AEMO NEM generation fuel mix (% by source)
notes: AEMO Quarterly Energy Dynamics Q4 2025 Table 3 reports NEM supply mix contributions by fuel type for Q4 2025. The headline value is total renewable-plus-battery share from the table: distributed PV 17.6%, wind 16.3%, grid solar 10.1%, hydro 5.7%, biomass 0.2% and battery 1.1%. Fossil-fuel shares remain separate in extra.fields.
source_rights: AEMO terms of use for tabular data
citation: Australian Energy Market Operator, Quarterly Energy Dynamics Q4 2025, Table 3 NEM supply mix contribution by fuel type.
